findings.title: Scope Boundaries section has conflicting deferred vs. out-of-scope categories
findings.why_it_matters: Both sections list 'Adding new providers' creating ambiguity about whether permanently excluded or deferred
findings.fix: Merge into clearer categories: permanently excluded (铁律) vs deferred (future phase)

findings.title: U3 proposes creating repo-utils.test.ts which already exists (187 lines)
findings.why_it_matters: Implementer would overwrite 187 lines of existing passing tests. Gap analysis 'zero direct tests' is factually wrong.
findings.fix: Drop U3 entirely or reframe as extending existing repo-utils.test.ts with missing scenarios

findings.title: U1/U2 propose new files but repo.test.ts already covers repo CRUD (68 lines)
findings.why_it_matters: Creates separate files fragmenting coverage. Should extend existing repo.test.ts.
findings.fix: Reframe U1/U2 as extensions to repo.test.ts; add missing error paths

findings.title: U4 round-trip claim ignores existing storage.test.ts (299 lines)
findings.why_it_matters: U4's premise that no round-trip tests exist is wrong. Must acknowledge and scope to gaps only.
findings.fix: Acknowledge storage.test.ts; scope U4 to backward-compat fixtures + branching round-trip only

findings.title: Provider gap count overstates untested providers (85 test files, not 4)
findings.why_it_matters: Gap analysis understates existing coverage. Risks re-testing already-covered behavior.
findings.fix: Re-scan packages/ai/test/; map existing tests to providers; scope to genuinely untested providers

findings.title: Env var injection for API keys in tests lacks guard against real-credential leakage
findings.why_it_matters: On dev machine or CI with ambient credentials, auth path may succeed against real creds. If fetch incompletely mocked, real outbound call possible.
findings.fix: Add beforeEach/afterEach that saves and clears all auth env vars before each test. Document in mock-fetch helper contract.

findings.title: Backward-compat inline JSONL fixtures offer no guidance on sanitizing real-looking session content
findings.why_it_matters: Inline fixtures copied from real sessions could contain PII or credential-shaped strings
findings.fix: Add note that all fixture strings must be fully synthetic

findings.title: Model list loading tests absent from U5/U6/U7 despite explicit origin requirement
findings.why_it_matters: Origin explicitly required model list loading tests as P1 must-have. No unit delivers it.
findings.fix: Add model-list-loading test scenario to provider units for providers with .models.ts

findings.title: U7 creates 4 separate test files where parametrized pattern suffices
findings.why_it_matters: special-providers.test.ts adds second parametrized file with no technical distinction from U6
findings.fix: Merge special-providers.test.ts into U6's parametrized suite. Keep bedrock/vertex/copilot separate.

findings.title: U4 dependency on U1 mock-fs declared but approach text permits real temp dirs
findings.why_it_matters: Dependency declaration misleading if U4 uses real temp dirs
findings.fix: Commit to mock-fs for backward-compat fixtures (avoids redundancy with storage.test.ts)

residual_risks: Plan's gap analysis was factually wrong for session layer (5 existing test files, not 2) and AI providers (85 test files, not 4). Plan must be revised before implementation.
Existing tests may be behavioral/compat, not fetch-level mock tests — the gap may still exist but is smaller than stated
verdict: P0: plan proposes creating existing file. Major gap-analysis errors. Plan must be revised before implementation.
